description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.55.1

⛅ Weather display now more resilient to external outages — If the weather data source experiences problems, the app continues to display the most recently retrieved data. (This addresses the issue where weather could not be displayed temporarily on July 3.)

v1.55.0

Shop QR code workflow has been improved.

📱 After scanning a shop QR code, you are guided to the home page — Scan a shop card's QR code to automatically "support" the shop. You'll see a "Added to supported shops" confirmation, and tapping OK takes you to the home page. The supported shop's events appear on your calendar right away.

⭐ Fixed issue where supported shops would disappear when logged out — Previously, shops you supported while logged out would disappear after logging back in on the same browser. This bug has been fixed.

🗑 Hidaka City trash collection calendar in preparation — Some implementation work is in progress. Please wait a little longer for the official release.
